title: HidePluginsFromPlayers
description: A plugin that intercepts /plugins, /pl, and /bukkit:plugins commands to block and hide your Minecraft server's plugin list, responding with a customizable Nice Try message to prevent players from discovering installed plugins and stop plugin command snoopi
body:
A simple plugin that blocks /plugins, /pl, and /bukkit:plugins commands from revealing your server's plugin list. Players receive a customizable Nice Try message instead, protecting your server's security.

**Features:**
* Blocks /plugins, /pl, and /bukkit:plugins commands
* Customizable denial message
* Lightweight performance
* Compatible with Bukkit/Spigot/Paper servers

**How to use:**
Simply install the plugin and it automatically intercepts plugin list commands and displays your custom message.

**Permissions:**
hideplugins.bypass - Allows players to bypass the block and view plugins normally. Server operators have this by default.
